name: Vina Concha y Toro S.A.
summary: Vi√É¬±a Concha y Toro S.A., together with its subsidiaries, produces and distributes wines in primarily in Chile, Argentina, and the United States. It sells its premium wines, fine wine collection, and varietal wines under the Don Melchor, Amelia, Sendero, Tocornal, Maipo, SBX, Carmin De Peumo, Cono Sur, Casillero Del Diablo, Isla Negra, Ocio, 20 Barrels, Devil's Collection, Diablo, Frontera, Frontera Premium, Gran Reserva Serie Riberas, Gravas, Late Harvest, Leyenda, Marques De Casa Concha, Red Blend, Reserva Especial, Reserva Privada, Rose, Subercaseaux, Sunrise, Terrunyo, Bicicleta, Palo Alto, Maycas del Limar√É¬≠, Trivento, Eolo, Pampas del Sur, La Chamiza, Fetzer, Bonterra, Jekel, Coldwater Creek, Eagle Peak, Sanctuary, Sundial, Valley Oaks, Bel Arbor, Stony Brook, Five Rivers, Pacific Bay, 1000 Stories, and Trio brand names. The company is also involved in real estate business. It has approximately 12,000 hectares of vineyards. The company also exports its products. Vi√É¬±a Concha y Toro S.A. was founded in 1883 and is headquartered in Las Condes, Chile.
